name: OpenSIN Onboarding
description: Autonomous first-run onboarding for OpenSIN — sets up Passwordmanager, Google Cloud Secrets, Chrome Extension, API keys, and platform accounts with zero manual intervention

skills.name: System Bootstrap
skills.description: Verify and install system prerequisites (Node.js, Python, gcloud, Chrome)

skills.name: GCP Project Setup
skills.description: Create GCP project, enable Secret Manager, create service account

skills.name: Passwordmanager Setup
skills.description: Build and configure A2A-SIN-Passwordmanager with gcloud backend

skills.name: Platform Registration
skills.description: Register accounts on Groq, NVIDIA NIM, Hugging Face and store API keys

skills.name: Verification
skills.description: Run end-to-end health checks on all onboarding components
